productDisplayName: Vans Men Brown Zapato Del Barco Shoes
description: Brown, round toed shoes with central lace fastening through metal eyelets Canvas upper with a frayed look around the overlays, stitched detail and reinforced overlay at the heel collar Lace detail around the mouth Padded mouth and footbed, soft inner and tongue EVA midsole with foxing around the toe box Smooth vulcanised rubber outsole with wave like pattern on it
